name: 05-13-tavern-doorway-ritual-mvp
title: Tavern doorway ritual MVP — one immersive beat before workbench
description: Create one clear immersion beat (space hook + NPC greeting) before exposing chat workbench controls. Hide channels, Shift+Enter, intent chips, identity selector until after first immersion moment.
creator: claude
notes: Child task of 05-12-onsite-visitor-brutal-audit-issues. Combines issues #2 (weak map affordance), #3 (discovery overload), #4 (copy leaks), #5 (workbench exposure). Entry ritual is the first moment that must feel like 'real map → tavern → AI NPC', not workbench controls.
